dialogos.texto_en: (Oh?\n Is that Nino and Miku\n resting by those chairs over there?)
*sigh*\nWhile doing activities is great,\nI also need time to relax when I'm at the beach.
I think I prefer to relax at the beach too.
Yo, you guys look very relaxed.
Oh, hi Fu-kun.
Yeah, I don't feel like moving, \nI'm in a VERY relaxed state right now.
Should we just spend our whole lives here,\nlooking at the sea?
Well, that's a bit too relaxing.
It's important to feel relaxed but,\nhave you been drinking enough water?\nWe've been moving around quite a bit, so be careful.
Now that you mention it,\nI haven't been drinking enough.
I'm feeling a little thirsty,\nbut I don't want to move.
Jeez.
Sooo, can you get us some drinks, Fu-kun?
Why me? Go get 'em yourself.
If you don't do something, \nwe are going to be severely dehydrated.\nAre you okay with that, Futaro?
If you're so lazy you can't even buy yourself a drink,\nit's your own fault if you get dehydrated!
Wha?\nYou're so cold, Fu-kun.
Well, I guess we'll decide over rock-paper-scissors\nand the loser has to go buy the drinks.
Agreed.
You just really don't want to go by yourself huh...
That's not true, you know?\nIf I lose, I'll gladly go.
Fine then, I guess that's fair.\nI'll accept the challenge.
Here we go.\nRock, paper%p-2;――
Scissors!
Okay, you lose, Fu-kun.
...How many rounds are we doing?
Don't be a sore loser.\nYou lost already, Futaro, so just go buy the drinks.
See you in a bit.
Kkh....\nFine, the results are the results.
Here, I bought the drinks.
Appreciate it.
Thank you.
You didn't have any specific requests,\nso I just picked drinks that seemed Okinawa-ish.
Okinawa-ish?\nIt's hard to tell just from the color.
This one is 'shikuwasa' citrus fruit flavour.\nThere's also a passionfruit, a dragonfruit,\nand a mango flavoured one.
Isn't shikuwasa the only Okinawa-ish one?
Don't complain.\nAt least I picked all tropical fruit flavoured ones.
But, I think they're pretty good choices.\nI'm not sure which one to pick.
Mmmhh...\nThey all look delicious.
Hmmm...
(You're having trouble deciding that much?)
Hurry up and pick something.
Futaro, don't rush me.
But, If you take too long,\nit'll get lukewarm.\nIt tastes better when it's cold.
Okay, okay, got it.
I've decided.\nI'm in the mood for some shikuwasa juice.
Then I'll have the passion and dragon fruit.\nI have no idea what it'll taste like.
Okay, so that leaves the mango for me.
It's hard to choose.\nI narrowed it down to these three\nafter thinking about it for a while.
I should have asked you guys\nwhat you wanted before going to buy them.
If you had asked me first,\nI think you would've still had a hard time deciding.
I bet you still wouldn't even have gone\nto buy the juice yet.
I can just picture the situation...
I've decided.\nI'm in the mood for some shikuwasa juice.
Then I'll have the passion and dragon fruit.\nI have no idea what it'll taste like.
Okay, so that leaves the mango for me.
Should I have gotten other flavors?\nThere was also a berry mix.
I want everyone to like the flavors I picked,\nsince I went all that way.\nOtherwise, it would be a waste of my effort.
Oh, come on, if there were more choices,\nit would be even harder to decide.
I wouldn't be able to decide.
Even with just these three flavors it's hard, eh.
But don't worry.\nFu-kun chose them, so they should all taste good.
That's right, I trust your instincts, Futaro.
I've decided.\nI'm in the mood for some shikuwasa juice.
Then I'll have the passion and dragon fruit.\nI have no idea what it'll taste like.
Okay, so that leaves the mango for me.
Mmm! This is delicious!
It's almost like drinking the actual fruit.\nI heard they use local produce for some of it.
Ahh...\nJust sipping on juice like this\nand gazing out at the ocean. How marvelous.
Yes, we're fully enjoying our vacation.
Absolutely.\nI never thought we would experience something like this.
I drank it all in no time.
I might need a little more...
I feel the same way.\nI want another glass.\nI want to try a different flavor this time.
Well then, Futaro.
You mean I have to buy more?!
Should we play rock-paper-scissors again?\nI think we'll win once again.
Alright, bring it on!\nBut this time it's best out of three!
